email_subject: Application for Internship Internal & Corporate Communication (Sept 2026)
email_body:
Dear DPG Media Team,

I am writing to apply for the Stagiair(e) Interne & Corporate Communicatie position starting September 2026. As a junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, social media coordination, and internal communication support, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your team.

In my current role at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and build WordPress sites—skills that translate directly to pimping newsletters, creating social media visuals, and brainstorming internal activations. I am proficient in Canva, CMS platforms, and have a creative eye for fresh copy and engaging visuals. My project mirook.com involved full-site design, structured data implementation, and social media integration, demonstrating my ability to handle diverse communication tasks.

I am a team player, eager to learn, and not afraid to step out of my comfort zone. I look forward to bringing my enthusiasm and digital skills to DPG Media.

Thank you for considering my application. I would love to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Warm regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear DPG Media Team,

I am thrilled to apply for the Stagiair(e) Interne & Corporate Communicatie position starting September 2026. As a junior digital marketer with a strong foundation in content creation, social media, and internal communication, I am eager to bring my skills to your dynamic team.

In my current role at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and build WordPress sites—skills that directly align with pimping newsletters, creating social media visuals, and brainstorming internal activations. I am proficient in Canva, CMS platforms, and have a creative eye for fresh copy and engaging visuals. My project mirook.com involved full-site design, structured data implementation, and social media integration, demonstrating my ability to handle diverse communication tasks.

I am a team player, eager to learn, and not afraid to step out of my comfort zone. I thrive in fast-paced environments and enjoy collaborating with colleagues to bring ideas to life. My experience in logistics at Katoen Natie taught me accuracy and efficiency, while my front-end development background at ViviDoctor honed my technical and problem-solving skills.

I am particularly drawn to DPG Media because of its reputation as a leading media company and the opportunity to work with a team that values creativity and impact. I am confident that my digital communication skills, combined with my enthusiasm and willingness to learn, make me a strong candidate for this internship.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of contributing to your team and growing as a communication professional.

Warm regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Proficient in Canva for creating visually appealing designs and social media visuals
Experienced in CMS platforms (WordPress) and content management for newsletters and websites
Skilled in writing fresh copy, blog content, and engaging social media posts
Creative team player with experience in brainstorming and executing internal activations
Quick learner with a proactive, out-of-the-box mindset and comfort with digital tools
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Content · Social Media · Internal Communication
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, social media coordination, and internal communication support. At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and build WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com), I designed the full site, created social media content, and implemented structured data. Proficient in Canva, CMS platforms, and creative copywriting. Team player with a proactive, out-of-the-box mindset. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building, Canva design
- Social media: social media content creation, integration, and coordination
- Communication: internal communication support, newsletter pimping, creative copywriting, interviewing
- Digital tools: CMS, Canva, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, Content & Social Media (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Created engaging content and visuals for social media channels
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and ran technical audits to improve visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
